sidebar.summary.label: Server summary
topbar.appearance.label: Appearance
topbar.language.label: Language
settings.page.title: Settings
settings.page.heading: Keep the server clear.
settings.page.description: Settings stay grouped around everyday publishing work. Deeper system details stay in calm supporting panels.
settings.localization.title: Localization
settings.localization.description: Dashboard language is only your Admin UI preference. Site languages describe the public site and future Theme Context.
settings.localization.dashboardDescripti: Saved in a culture cookie so it can switch the current Admin UI without touching the frontend Theme.
settings.localization.urlPolicyValue: Primary language has no prefix; other languages use a language prefix.
settings.localization.customDescription: Use this for languages not in the built-in list. Bocchi suggests BCP 47 tags but keeps custom codes editable.
settings.localization.customIncomplete: Custom language needs code, native name, and English name.
settings.localization.customDuplicate: This language already exists in the picklist.
